description: You are an Electrical BIM Technician modeling small power layouts in the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building model. Create a main electrical distribution board (IfcDistributionBoard) and at least four electrical socket outlets (IfcOutlet) on the ground floor according to the electrical design brief on the workstation desktop. Establish an electrical circuit system named 'Power Circuit 1' (IfcDistributionSystem or IfcSystem) and assign the distribution board and the four outlets to this system. Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_electrical.ifc.
